subject: A slender humanoid figure in a dark suit with light swept-back hair and glasses, standing in a composed, dignified pose — strongly matches Ignis Scientia from Final Fantasy XV
description: A slender figure in a fitted dark suit stands in a composed, upright posture with arms relaxed at their sides. The figure has light-colored swept-back hair and wears rectangular-framed glasses. Their expression is calm and controlled. A ghosted close-up of the same face appears in the upper right, emphasizing the character's composed demeanor. The card is labeled 'Forward / Retainer' from Final Fantasy XV. The character's appearance, name, and FFXV affiliation identify this as Ignis Scientia. The background is a warm gold tone with no distinct environment. No weapon is visible in the hands.
foreground: Slender figure in dark suit with glasses, standing upright
background: Warm gold gradient with ghosted close-up portrait
emotion: stoic, composed — controlled body language, neutral expression
